title: Software development Engineer
description:
**How You'll Help Us Keep Climbing (Overview \\& Key Responsibilities)**
**Role Description**
 As a Software Development Engineer (SDE) in Delta’s Enterprise Payments team, you will design, build, and optimize backend systems that power secure, reliable, and high‑performance payment experiences for millions of Delta customers worldwide. You will work across microservices, distributed systems, cloud\\-native architectures, and PCI‑compliant payment integrations to deliver mission‑critical solutions that directly impact Delta’s global digital commerce ecosystem. You will collaborate with cross‑functional engineering, architecture, security, and product teams to develop scalable APIs, enhance payment workflows, and ensure seamless integration with internal and external payment partners. This role requires strong backend engineering skills, hands\\-on experience with Java/Spring Boot, and the ability to craft highly available, fault\\-tolerant systems in AWS. In this position, you will contribute to building the next generation of Delta’s enterprise payment platform—one that is robust, high\\-performing, and aligned with Delta’s commitment to exceptional customer experience.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and develop scalable backend systems and APIs using Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, RESTful APIs.
* Build and maintain payment\\-related components and integrations in AWS.
* Implement secure, PCI\\-compliant solutions and ensure adherence to Delta’s standards and CI/CD practices.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to design, Develop and deliver high‑quality technical solutions
* Support deployments and ensure adherence to Delta’s methodology, standards, and CI/CD practices.
* Troubleshoot and optimize application performance across front\\-end and back\\-end layers.
* Participate in code reviews and knowledge sharing to maintain code quality and team alignment.
* Ensure technical solutions align with business goals and deliver high customer satisfaction.


**Technical Competencies**
**What You Need To Succeed (Minimum Qualifications)**
* Education: BS/MS in Computer Science or related technical field.
* Experience: 2–4 years in full\\-stack development.
* Strong hands\\-on experience in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, and RESTful APIs.
* Working knowledge of AWS services such as EC2, Lambda, S3, API Gateway.
* Experience with Oracle/SQL and source control tools (Git).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and Agile methodologies.
* Understanding of secure coding principles; exposure to PCI standards is a plus.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and ability to learn new technologies quickly.
* Strong communication skills and professionalism.
* Additionally, candidates must be a self\\-learner with the ability to pick up new technologies and provide tangible results.
* Finally, Candidate must be Reliable, produce quality work, take pride and ownership in their work with high level of professionalism, passion and a sense of urgency to make things happen.


**BeBehavioral Competencies**
* Ability to work in collaborative environments and embrace diverse perspectives.
* Communicate clearly and concisely, express thoughts and ideas effectively, and embrace cultural differences with respect when engaging with others.
* Ability to engage effectively with peers and stakeholders to build strong partnerships.
* Prioritize, maintain focus, and consistently deliver commitment.
* Proactively understand customer expectations and willingness to create customer\\-based solutions.


**What Will Give You a Competitive Edge (Preferred Qualifications)**
* Frontend experience with React, Angular, JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
* Exposure to Apigee, JBOSS, or other containers.
* Understanding of payment gateway processes.
* Experience with DevOps practices.
* An eye for detail and passion for delivering quality work.


**About The Company**
**Delta Air Lines** 
 (NYSE: DAL) is the U.S. global airline leader in safety, innovation, reliability and customer experience. Powered by our employees around the world, Delta has for a decade led the airline industry in operational excellence while maintaining our reputation for award\\-winning customer service. With our mission of connecting the people and cultures of the globe, Delta strives to foster understanding across a diverse world and serve as a force for social good.
   

  

 In 2024, Delta was recognized by Fortune with a No. 11 placement on
 **Fortune’s Top 50 Most Admired Companies** 
 list. The company’s strong management and commitment to providing elevated experiences and premium products also secured a No. 1 ranking out of the eight airlines on the list. Delta landed on
 **TIME’s** 
 inaugural list of the
 **“World’s Best Companies,”** 
 coming in at No. 12 – the only U.S. airline in the top 155\\. TIME’s award is based on three criteria: employee satisfaction, revenue growth and sustainability.
   

  

 Delta’s people\\-first culture continues to be recognized, earning the airline a spot on
 **Fortune’s 100 Best Companies to Work For®** 
 list for the fifth year. Delta is the only airline included on the 2024 list.
   

  

 Additionally, Delta earned a coveted spot, on
 **Fast Company** 
 ’s list of the
 **Most Innovative Companies,** 
 climbing from its No. 8 spot in 2023 to No. 2 in the travel category. The airline was recognized for its Wi\\-Fi revolution that is working to ensure the future of travel is connected.
   

  

**About The Delta Technology Hub (DTH), Bangalore**
 Delta has fast emerged as a customer\\-focused, innovation\\-led, technology\\-enabled business. The Delta Technology Hub will contribute directly to these objectives. It will sustain our long\\-term aspirations of delivering niche, IP\\-intensive, high\\-value, and innovative solutions. It supports various teams and functions across Delta and is an integral part of our transformation agenda, working seamlessly with a distributed team to create memorable experiences for customers.
   

  

**“Why join?”:**
* Technology is a key enabler of the differentiated services that Delta provides. At the DTH, you get the opportunity to work on projects with a significant impact on business outcomes and customer experience.
* Deepen your knowledge by taking part in multifaceted learning and development programs –exposure to extensive internal and partner repositories, institutional affiliations, and industry SIG (Special Interest Groups) partnerships.
* Collaborate with research, innovation and IP co\\-development partners.
* Immerse yourself in an employee\\-centric culture.
* Develop deep and broad business acumen on airline operations while retaining focus on cutting\\-edge technology driven solutions.
* Avail a full range of benefits that support you and your family: Insurance, Commute, Meals, Retirement, and Special Travel opportunities.
* Avail a full range of benefits that support you and your family: Insurance, Commute, Meals and special travel opportunities.

**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




 Jade Global is seeking a Technical Architect to join the AI \\& Digital Engineering (AI\\&DE) practice as a technically deep, delivery\\-focused architect. You will work as an embedded technical leader within engineering teams — translating architecture decisions into working solutions, ensuring quality in execution, and contributing to the development of AI\\-native frameworks and accelerators.
 



 This role is best suited for an engineer who has grown into architecture through hands\\-on delivery experience, has strong command of both .NET and OpenSource stacks, and is eager to apply modern AI and cloud\\-native concepts to solve real enterprise problems.
 



**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 




**Technical Architecture \\& Delivery** 



* Own technical architecture decisions on delivery engagements — designing component\\-level solutions that align with broader architecture blueprints defined by the Solution or Principal Architect.
* Actively participate in engineering delivery, bridging the gap between architectural intent and implementation — reviewing code, driving technical design sessions, and unblocking development teams.
* Ensure technical quality across deliverables — conducting architecture and code reviews, validating implementation against design standards, and driving resolution of technical debt.
* Manage technical risk on delivery projects and escalate architectural concerns to the Solution Architect.



**AI \\& Engineering Framework Adoption** 



* Learn, implement, and advocate for AI\\-native engineering practices — including GenAI integration patterns, agentic workflows, and intelligent automation — within delivery teams.
* Contribute to the development and maintenance of AI engineering frameworks, solution accelerators, and reusable technical assets.
* Evaluate and experiment with new tools, APIs, and platforms in the AI and cloud\\-native space — bringing relevant innovations into delivery practice.



**Technical Consulting \\& Problem Solving** 



* Engage with client technical teams to understand system landscapes, integration requirements, and technical constraints.
* Propose pragmatic, technology\\-forward solutions to complex engineering challenges across application modernization, AI integration, and cloud migration.
* Support the Solution and Principal Architect in pre\\-sales activities including technical assessments, proof\\-of\\-concept design, and effort estimation.



**Cloud \\& Automation Implementation** 



* Design and implement cloud\\-native architectures on AWS, Azure, or GCP — including containerization (Kubernetes/Docker), serverless functions, and event\\-driven patterns.
* Implement intelligent automation components using workflow engines, RPA tools, or custom AI\\-driven pipelines.



**Engineering Community \\& Mentoring** 



* Mentor senior engineers and developers — supporting technical upskilling on AI tools, cloud platforms, and modern engineering practices.
* Contribute to Jade's internal community of practice through knowledge sharing, documentation, and participation in architecture discussions.



**QUALIFICATIONS** 




**Education** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, or a related technical field is required.



**Experience** 



* 5–9 years of total experience in software engineering, with at least 2–3 years in a technical architecture, lead engineer, or tech lead role.
* Hands\\-on experience building and delivering enterprise\\-grade solutions across cloud, AI/ML, and application engineering.
* Experience working in client\\-facing delivery environments within IT services or consulting organizations is preferred.



**Technical Skills** 



* Engineering Stack: Strong hands\\-on proficiency in .NET (C\\#, ASP.NET Core) and/or OpenSource stacks (Python, Java, Node.js). Experience across both stacks is a strong advantage.
* AI \\& GenAI: Practical exposure to Generative AI integration, LLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI), LangChain, RAG patterns, or agentic workflow frameworks.
* Cloud: Hands\\-on experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP — microservices, containers (Docker/Kubernetes), serverless, and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps).
* Intelligent Automation: Exposure to RPA tools, workflow orchestration engines, or AI\\-driven automation platforms.
* Enterprise Platforms: Familiarity with Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, or ServiceNow is a plus.
* Cloud Certification (any level — AWS, Azure, or GCP) is a plus.



**Soft Skills** 



* Strong technical communication — able to explain architecture decisions clearly to engineering teams and non\\-technical stakeholders.
* Delivery\\-focused and hands\\-on — willing to roll up sleeves and contribute to implementation alongside leading architectural decisions.
* Curious and self\\-motivated — proactively explores new AI tools, frameworks, and engineering patterns.
* Collaborative team player — works effectively in onshore\\-offshore delivery models across time zones.

title: Technical Consultant –SaaS Platform Development
description:
**About Climate Collective Foundation (CCF)** 




 Climate Collective Foundation (CCF) works to accelerate climate innovation and entrepreneurship in India. As part of this mission, CCF is developing an Impact SaaS platform that enables climate\\-tech startups and investors to calculate, track, verify, and report climate impacts.
 



 The platform will integrate startup impact data, calculation models, and investor portfolio analytics, enabling investors to monitor climate impact across their portfolios while allowing startups to generate standardised impact reports.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 CCF is seeking an experienced developer/architect to lead the development of the Impact SaaS platform.
 



 The developer will work closely with the CCF team to translate existing Excel\\-based impact calculation tools into a functional SaaS platform, design the system architecture, and build core modules including user management, startup data entry, impact calculation, investor portfolios, and dashboards.
 



 The development is a priority project, with the goal of delivering a functional platform within 2 months.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 1\\.
 **Platform Architecture \\& Development** 




 Design and develop the core architecture of the Impact SaaS platform.
 



 Responsibilities include:
 


* Designing scalable database structures and workflows
* Developing responsive web interfaces and user flows
* Implementing role\\-based authentication and user management
* Structuring data relationships between startups, projects, investors, and portfolios



  





 2
 **. Impact Calculation Engine** 




 Translate existing Excel\\-based impact tools into platform workflows.
 



 Tasks include:
 


* Converting calculation logic into backend workflows
* Implementing formulas and conditional logic for impact calculations
* Structuring data pipelines for impact metrics (e.g., emissions avoided, energy saved, water conserved)
* Ensuring accuracy and validation of calculations in collaboration with the impact team



  





**3\\. Data Collection and Input Modules** 




 Develop dynamic input interfaces for startups.
 



 Responsibilities include:
 


* Building domain\\-specific data entry forms for climate solutions (mobility, waste, circular economy, clean energy, etc.)
* Enabling project\\-level data inputs
* Supporting bulk data uploads (CSV/Excel) where applicable
* Ensuring data integrity and validation across workflows



  





**4\\. Investor Portfolio Module** 




 Develop investor\\-facing portfolio management features.
 



 Tasks include:
 


* Creating investor accounts and portfolio management interfaces
* Allowing investors to add startups to their portfolios
* Implementing startup confirmation workflows for project visibility
* Aggregating impact metrics at the portfolio level



  





**5\\. Dashboards and Reporting** 




 Develop visual dashboards for both startups and investors.
 



 Responsibilities include:
 


* Startup dashboards displaying project\\-level impact results
* Investor dashboards showing aggregated portfolio impact
* Domain\\-wise impact visualisations
* Generating downloadable reports or impact certificates



  





**6\\. Testing and Quality Assurance** 




 Ensure platform stability and usability.
 



 Tasks include:
 


* Conducting module testing and end\\-to\\-end workflow testing
* Identifying and resolving bugs and UX issues
* Supporting user acceptance testing with startups and investors



  





**7\\. Documentation and Knowledge Transfer** 




 Prepare documentation as per CCF protocol to support long\\-term platform maintenance.
 



  





**Responsibilities include:** 



* Documenting database structures and workflows
* Preparing technical notes for platform management
* Supporting the development of user guides and SOPs



  





**Required Experience** 



* Proven experience building applications similar to the impact platform
* Experience designing SaaS platforms or complex web applications
* Strong understanding of database design, workflows, and data relationships
* Ability to translate Excel\\-based logic and analytical models into software workflows
* Experience building data dashboards and reporting interfaces
* Ability to work independently and deliver within tight timelines



  





**Preferred Experience** 



* Experience building analytics or data\\-driven platforms
* Familiarity with API integrations, plugins, and external services
* Experience working with impact measurement, sustainability, or ESG\\-related platforms
* Exposure to data visualisation tools and dashboard design



  





**Deliverables**

description:

 Job Description

	+ Setting the criteria, parameters, scope/out\\-scope of testing and involve in UAT (User Acceptance Testing)
	+ Automate the test life cycle process at the appropriate stages through vb macros, scheduling, GUI automation etc
* **To design and execute the automation framework and reporting** 
	+ Develop and automate tests for software validation by setting up of test environments, designing test plans, developing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
	+ Ensure the test defects raised are as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
	+ Detect bug issues and prepare file defect reports and report test progress
	+ No instances of rejection / slippage of delivered work items and they are within the Wipro / Customer  SLA's and norms
	+ Design and timely release of test status dashboard at the end of every cycle test execution to the stake holders

 ͏

title: MTS 4 - QA
description:
**Hungry, Humble, Honest, with Heart.**
**The Opportunity**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Quality Assurance Lead Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in quality engineering for backend and distributed systems, with a sharp eye for design, user flows, and end\\-to\\-end product behavior. It would be a big advantage to have experience in platform engineering and hardware qualifications. Candidates are expected to have very strong debugging skills and automation experience, preferably in python. They should be able to define and own quality strategies for complex distributed system architectures, design robust test frameworks, and drive quality across a wide team.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The
 **FleX team** 
 is a critical engineering group within Nutanix’s
 **R\\&D Platform** 
 organization, dedicated to providing a seamless hardware enablement and qualification ecosystem that allows both Nutanix and its external partners to qualify new hardware components and platforms independently
   

  

**Your Role**
* Looking for a QA lead who can help lead a team of qa engineers for the platform engineering team.
* Writing and executing detailed test plans to thoroughly validate features.
* Participate in defining product requirements, reviewing product design, performance, and scalability plans.
* Automating all aspects of the workflow, including test harnesses and frameworks.
* keen understanding of hardware certification processes is a plus
* Collaborating with a team of developers, test engineers, product management.
* Working closely with development engineers to detail and find the root cause of failures.
* Engage with customer support engineers as well as customers to debug and solve production issues.


**What You Will Bring**
* Minimum of 6–10 years of testing experience in a Data Center product company.
* BE or MS in Computer Science or related field.
* Experience in Test Automation in one of the following programming languages.
* Python/Perl/C/C\\+\\+/Java (Python preferred).
* Good understanding of platform engineering, networking concepts and protocols .
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and Go Programming Language will be a definite plus.
* Experience testing distributed, cloud\\-native systems.
* Experience using virtualization technologies such as VMware, Hyper\\-V, or KVM
* Experience with building/testing a scalable solution and performance testing.
* Prior system testing experience of large scale deployments will be a big plus.
* Experience with distributed software systems.
* Experience with jira, jenkins and CI/CD. Experience with Version Control System (git)
* Basic understanding of UNIX/Linux/Windows.
* Can\\-do attitude while solving difficult problems spanning across multiple teams
* Comfortable working in a fast\\-moving, agile environment


**Work Arrangement**
 Hybrid: This role operates in a hybrid capacity, blending the benefits of remote work with the advantages of in\\-person collaboration. In locations where our workplace policy applies (i.e. San Jose, Durham, Mexico City, Bangalore, Pune, Hoofddorp, Belgrade, Barcelona, Singapore, Sydney and Tokyo), employees are expected to work onsite a minimum of 3 days per week to foster collaboration, team alignment, and access to in\\-office resources. Workplace type may vary based on location and team requirements. Please speak with your recruiter for details. Additional team\\-specific guidance and norms will be provided by your manager.

title: Senior High Performance Compute (HPC) Verification & Validation Engineer
description:
Schaeffler is a dynamic global technology company and its success has been a result of its entrepreneurial spirit and long history of private ownership. Does that sound interesting to you? As a partner to all of the major automobile manufacturers, as well as key players in the aerospace and industrial sectors, we offer you many development opportunities.
   

  

 General Information:
   

  

 The performance of the applied software testing strategy is analyzed and continuously improved to ensure competitiveness of SAG's embedded software development. The Target of this role is to ensure a highly effective and efficient testing approach that maximizes reuse, automation and virtualization in both development and testing processes. A well\\-aligned software testing strategy that leverages advanced test methods (e.g. Continuous Integration/Continuous Testing), environments (including cloud\\-based) and tools is provided for achieving cost\\-effective software development. This role serves as a key enabler for maintaining a competitive edge in the rapidly evolving automotive software landscape.
   

  

 Your Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Requirements Analysis \\& Test Strategy definition
* Test Planning \\& Test Architecture definition
* Automation \\& CI/CT Integration
* Usage of Simulation \\& Virtual Validation tools where applicable
* Definition and Execution of Model, HiL and Vehicle Level testing
* Consider Functional Safety \\& Cybersecurity in V\\&V activities
* Training of Developers, Test Engineers
* Drive continuous improvements in V\\&V methodologies


 Your Qualifications:
   

  

* University degree in a relevant field (computer science, electronics and communication, information science), master’s degree desired.
* More than 4 years’ experience in Automotive Software technology and experience in international Software projects with global OEM’s, ideally including projects touching ADAS and/or IVI environments and their interfaces to vehicle control functions.
* Working experience with virtualization and simulation frameworks used in automotive HPC algorithm validation is an added value
* Deep knowledge of software test management and engineering related tooling
* Deep knowledge of applied software development, integration and testing workflow (e.g. model\\-based vs. handwritten code)
* Holistic overview on software tests, test environments and test automation related tooling
* General knowledge about software metrics and related KPIs to ensure an efficient and effective test strategy
* General knowledge about CI/CT, AI\\- and cloud solutions for software testing
* General overview of the testing approaches of other disciplines along the V\\-Cycle
* Awareness of safety\\-critical systems and safety standards (e.g., ISO 26262\\).
* Stress, performance, and workload‑based validation of compute platforms—aligned with general HPC V\\&V practices.
* Ability to simulate HPC compute loads and vehicle environments in model‑based validation frameworks.
* Creating rigorous test plans and executing validation activities for complex electronic systems.
* Manual and automated validation methods, regression testing, and system performance analysis.
* Ensuring traceability to requirements and adherence to automotive compliance.
* Proficiency in scripting languages such as Python to automate tests and analyze HPC behavior.


 As a global company with employees around the world, it is important to us that we treat each other with respect and value all ideas and perspectives. By appreciating our differences, we inspire creativity and drive innovation. In this way, we contribute to sustainable value creation for our stakeholders and society as a whole. Together, we advance how the world moves.
   

  

 Exciting assignments and outstanding development opportunities await you because we impact the future with innovation. We look forward to your application.
   

  

 www.schaeffler.com/careers
   

  

 Your Contact
   

  

 Vitesco Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.

title: Dynamics 365/ Power Platform & Net Web Developer
description:
We are seeking a Dynamics 365 / Power Platform \\& .NET Web Developer who is eager to learn and grow while contributing to both our back\\-office CRM solutions and our custom web portal. The ideal candidate will have a foundation in writing Dynamics 365 plugins and Power Automate flows, as well as hands\\-on experience with .NET development for backend services. This role offers the opportunity to expand technical expertise across the Power Platform and modern web technologies, while helping ensure the reliability, scalability, and efficiency of the Altai product suite.
 



  





 The candidate must demonstrate experience writing C\\# for both Dynamics 365 plugins and web development, as well as working with ASP.NET, Angular, TypeScript, and the Power Platform—specifically Power Apps and Power Automate flows. The ideal candidate will also have a strong foundation with Azure services, including Entra External ID (formerly Azure B2C), App Services, Azure Functions, Key Vault, and App registrations.
 



  





 The candidate should be comfortable interacting with technical and non\\-technical users alike and have a relentless passion for delivering high\\-quality solutions and providing excellent customer service.  
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Design and implement integrations between Dynamics 365 and external systems using APIs, middleware, and Azure services.
 



 • Leverages subject\\-matter expertise of product features and partners with appropriate stakeholders (e.g., product team, sales, project managers, and consultants) to support the company's project plans, release plans, and work items.
 



 • Develop custom plugins and Azure functions using C\\#.

 • Create documentation for clients and internal resources, including PowerPoint presentations, workflow diagrams, functional and technical specification documents, and training. 
 



  





 Skills Required
 



 • Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.
 



 • 3\\+ years of experience of developing solutions using C\\# and .NET, including web\\-based applications using ASP.NET, Angular, and TypeScript.
 



 • 3\\+ years of experience of developing solutions using C\\# and .NET, including plugins, workflows, and integrations.
 



 • 3\\+ years of experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, XML and JSON.
 



 • 2\\+ years of Power Platform development experience including Power Apps (Canvas and Model\\-Driven), Power BI, Power Automate, and Dataverse administration.
 



 • 2\\+ years of experience working with Azure services, including B2C, App Services, Azure Functions, Key Vault, Logic Apps and App registrations.  
 



 • Strong understanding of object\\-oriented programming, design patterns, and principles.
 



 • Knowledge of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines.
 



 • Familiarity with team collaboration tools, including GitHub and Jira.
 



 • Solid understanding of RESTful APIs and web services.
 



 • Experience with source control and DevOps practices.
 



 • Experience working in both agile and waterfall delivery models.
 



 • Passion for excellence in user experience and delivering quality solutions.
 



 • Demonstrated creative and analytical thinking.
 



 • Accurately estimate level of effort for implementation tasks.
 



 • Ability to manage multiple competing priorities and complex tasks simultaneously.
 



 • Ability to translate highly technical concepts into plain language for non\\-technical stakeholders.
 



 • Security
 



 • Awareness of PCI DSS and secure payment processing practices
 



 • Excellent problem\\-solving and analytical skills.
 



 • Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.
 



 • Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.
 



  





 Skills Preferred
 



 • Experience with other front\\-end frameworks/libraries.
 



 • Azure Data Lakes/Warehouses
 



 • Familiarity with Co\\-Pilot, AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics in the Dynamics 365 ecosystem.
 



 • Experience working with eCommerce solutions.
 



  





 If you are interested, you can drop your cv at chetna.motwani@iratechnologies.com
